commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Benjamin. Ten in number; though the Septuagint have only nine, and suppose that some of them were his grand-children. He was 33 (or 24, Menochius) years old. (Calmet)
Grotius thinks three names have been made out of two; Echi, Ros, and Mop him, out of Ahiram and Sup ham, as we read, Numbers xxvi. 38.
